news.summary: In Sarasota, Florida on May 22, 2025, Roper Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: ROP) stated they will participate in the TD Cowen 53rd Annual Technology, Media & Telecom Conference on May 29, 2025, at 9:05 AM ET in New York, NY. The webcast link for the presentation will be accessible in the "Investors" segment of the Company’s website, www.ropertech.com.
news.headline: Roper Technologies (Nasdaq: ROP) to present at TD Cowen 53rd Annual Technology, Media & Telecom Conference on May 29, 2025.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, INDIBA, a prominent provider of TECAR technology for various fields including rehabilitation, medical aesthetics, pelvic health, and animal health, unveiled its latest COMPACT Series. This innovative line comprises three advanced devices: COMPACT Lite, COMPACT Plus, and...
news.headline: INDIBA releases Compact Series with three devices for rehabilitation, aesthetics, and animal health.

news.summary: A conference call is scheduled for May 22, 2025, at 11 AM Eastern Time. The event is hosted by Zoomd Technologies Ltd. (TSXV: ZOMD; OTC: ZMDTF) along with its subsidiary, Zoomd Ltd. Known collectively as "Zoomd" or the "Company," they specialize in marketing technology for user-acquisition.
news.headline: Zoomd Technologies sees 108% revenue growth in Q1.2025. Conference call on May 22, 2025, at 11 AM ET.

news.summary: In Israel's Hod Hasharon on May 22, 2025, Valens Semiconductor (NYSE: VLN), a prominent player in high-performance connectivity, disclosed that CEO Gideon Ben Zvi will be stepping down by the conclusion of this year. This significant change comes after Mr. Ben Zvi’s successful leadership achievements during his tenure.
news.headline: Valens Semiconductor CEO Gideon Ben Zvi to step down by end of 2025 after successful term. #NYSE: VLN #Israel #CEO

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, in Hangzhou, China, Yunji Inc. ("Yunji"), a prominent membership-based social e-commerce platform listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol YJ, disclosed that its board of directors and audit committee sanctioned the termination of...
news.headline: Yunji Inc. appoints WWC, P.C. as independent registered public accounting firm. Stock symbol: YJ. May 22, 2025.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on May 22, 2025, Galiano Gold Inc. (TSX: GAU) (NYSE American: GAU) shared positive news. Institutional Shareholder Services Inc. ("ISS") and Glass Lewis and Co., LLC ("Glass Lewis") have both given recommendations in favor of Galiano. The company has received support from key institutional investors, with ISS and Glass Lewis endorsing its strategies and plans. This backing is pivotal for Galiano's growth and underscores confidence from major shareholders. The market responded positively to this development, reflected in the stock performance with a noticeable increase in trading volume and a rise in share price. This endorsement aligns with Galiano's vision and mission, emphasizing its strong standing in the industry in terms of investor relations and strategic direction.
news.headline: Proxy advisory firms ISS and Glass Lewis recommend Galiano Gold's shareholders vote for all proposed resolutions. TSX: GAU.

news.summary: The court has ruled that the board was justified in turning down Sherwood's director nominations due to non-compliance with bylaws. The uncontested 2025 Annual Meeting will proceed as planned on May 29, 2025. Alex Kinzler has informed the board that he will not be running for election at the 2025 Annual Meeting. The location of the meeting is in Honolulu.
news.headline: Delaware Court rules in favor of Barnwell, rejects Sherwood's director nominations for non-compliance with bylaws. Uncontested 2025 Annual Meeting to proceed as scheduled on May 29. Alex Kinzler will not stand for election.

news.summary: AI-native data observability platform Sifflet unveiled a preview of their latest system consisting of AI agents named Sentinel, Sage, and Forge. These agents aim to enhance memory, reasoning, and provide intelligent guidance to data teams. The announcement was made in New York on May 22, 2025. Sifflet's new system is designed to assist data teams in scaling efficiently, providing them with advanced tools and capabilities. This innovation is set to revolutionize the way data is managed, analyzed, and utilized by teams, offering a new level of support and efficiency.
news.headline: Sifflet introduces 3 AI agents - Sentinel, Sage, and Forge - to revolutionize data observability for modern data teams.

news.summary: Wealthbox, a top-rated CRM software for financial advisors, revealed a new enterprise CRM deal with Tucker Asset Management, a prominent advisor network and aggregator headquartered in Littleton, Colorado, on May 22, 2025. This agreement marks a significant milestone for Wealthbox and Tucker Asset Management, showcasing their commitment to enhancing their services and operations.
news.headline: Tucker Asset Management signs deal for 85 users with Wealthbox Enterprise CRM, a top software for financial advisors.

news.summary: Eventus, a top provider of extensive trade surveillance and financial risk solutions, has achieved its fourth victory in the market surveillance category in the last five years. The latest win was announced in Austin, Texas and Hong Kong on May 22, 2025. The award highlights the company's continued success in this arena and solidifies its position as a leader in the industry.
news.headline: Eventus wins Best Integrated Market Surveillance Platform at WatersTechnology Asia Awards 2025, marking their fourth win in this category in the past five years.

news.summary: Announcement was made today by the Global War on Terrorism Memorial Foundation (GWOTMF) unveiling Brian Bulatao, Partner at U.S.-based firm CNQ, as the individual bringing extensive public and private sector expertise to honor the nation's heroes. This move signifies the foundation's commitment to integrating a wealth of knowledge into its mission. With years of experience, Bulatao's contribution is anticipated to significantly impact GWOTMF's initiatives.
news.headline: Brian Bulatao joins GWOTMF Board of Directors, bringing decades of experience to honor nation's heroes.

news.summary: A recent collaboration has been established to enhance access to top-notch care for at-risk dual eligible special needs members in Maryland. AbsoluteCare, renowned for providing value-based healthcare, has revealed the extension of its partnership with CareFirst BlueCross BlueShield. This move aims to benefit a significant number of individuals in need, offering them quality services and support. The collaboration, effective as of May 22, 2025, signifies a step towards bolstering healthcare provisions for vulnerable populations in the region.
news.headline: AbsoluteCare and CareFirst BlueCross BlueShield expand partnership to provide high-quality care to Maryland's at-risk dual eligible special needs members. Announcement made on May 22, 2025.

news.summary: Dallas-based company, Capital Institutional Services, Inc. (CAPIS), has bolstered its commission recapture services through a strategic acquisition. On May 22, 2025, CAPIS revealed the acquisition of TD Securities' Plan Sponsor Services business. This acquisition, effective as of April 1, 2025, marks a significant move for CAPIS in expanding its services and market presence. This development signifies a noteworthy advancement for CAPIS in the financial services sector, emphasizing the company's commitment to growth and innovation. This acquisition transaction underscores CAPIS' focus on enhancing its offerings and further solidifying its position in the industry.
news.headline: CAPIS acquired TD Securities' Plan Sponsor Services business on April 1, 2025, to strengthen its commission recapture services.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, in Singapore, BoomFi revealed a collaboration with Paytiko, an all-in-one payment platform. BoomFi, specializing in uniting crypto and fiat currencies, aims to work with Paytiko to offer merchants globally a comprehensive payment solution. This partnership signifies a significant step towards enhanced payment services for businesses on a global scale.
news.headline: BoomFi and Paytiko partner to bring crypto payment rails to merchants globally, revolutionizing payment methods.

news.summary: Introducing the Zephyr Okeanito, a blend of smooth curves and clean lines that adds elegance and contemporary style to kitchen ventilation. Recently, Zephyr proudly revealed that its Okeanito Wall Range Hood in Brushed Gold has earned a prestigious recognition in the industry in 2025 from Architectural Digest. This award highlights the timeless design and impeccable craftsmanship of the hood.
news.headline: Zephyr's Okeanito Range Hood wins 2025 AD Great Design Award for its blend of soft curves and sleek lines.

news.summary: In a recent announcement on May 22, 2025, Custom Ink, a leading online provider of customized products and apparel for organizations and businesses, introduced Phil Auerbach as the new Chief Marketing Officer (CMO). Alongside this appointment, Justin Swietlik was promoted to the role of Chief Financial Officer (CFO), adding strength to the executive team. In another significant development, Kane Posner has been assigned the role of Senior Vice President (SVP) for Strategy. These strategic changes aim to bolster the company's leadership team and drive growth in the competitive market.
news.headline: Custom Ink appoints Phil Auerbach as CMO, Justin Swietlik as CFO, and Kane Posner as SVP, Strategy in its leadership team.

news.summary: Pleasanton, California-based Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ: WDAY) is set to unveil its Q1 earnings on May 22. Analysts predict earnings to be $2.01 per share, a rise from $1.74 per share last year. The anticipated quarterly revenue is $2.22 billion, an increase from $1.99 billion in the previous year. Edward Charter has been named country leader for Canada. On May 20, Workday's shares closed at $268.54, down 1.9%. For more updates, readers can check the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga, where ratings can be filtered by various criteria. Visit Benzinga.com for the complete story.
news.headline: Workday will announce Q1 earnings on May 22 with projected earnings at $2.01 per share and revenue at $2.22 billion.

news.summary: In Lehigh Valley, Pennsylvania, on May 22, 2025, the Board of Directors of Air Products announced a quarterly dividend of $1.79 per share of common stock (NYSE: APD). This dividend will be paid out on August 11, 2025, to shareholders of record as of July 1, 2025.
news.headline: Air Products declares dividend of $1.79/share. Payable on Aug 11, 2025, to shareholders on record as of July 1, 2025.

news.summary: In Nantong, China, on May 22, 2025, Sigenergy commenced construction of a smart manufacturing hub as part of its worldwide growth plan. This marks a significant step for the company, enhancing production capacity and serving as a crucial component of its production network. The hub is expected to create numerous job opportunities and contribute significantly to the local economy.
news.headline: Sigenergy opens new smart manufacturing hub in Nantong, China, to expand global reach.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, in Toronto, the Canadian Association of Retired Persons ("CARP"), an independent, not-for-profit advocacy group representing 255,000 members and seniors in Canada, collaborated with Integracare Inc., a prominent provider of private home healthcare services.
news.headline: Integracare Inc. partners with CARP, a non-profit with 255K members, to support Canadian seniors with home healthcare.

news.summary: A new healthcare facility has been established through a collaboration between MDVIP, a prominent provider of membership-based healthcare boasting a network of more than 1,300 primary care physicians, and board-certified family physician Dr. Gilberto Sustache, Jr. The facility opened on May 22, 2025, in Marlborough, Mass.
news.headline: Dr. Gilberto Sustache, Jr., partners with MDVIP to open family practice in MetroWest Boston. MDVIP has over 1,300 physicians.

news.summary: BTQ Technologies and Quandela have recently entered into a Memorandum of Understanding to collaborate on the potential benefits of photonic quantum computing in enhancing energy-efficient blockchain validation. This partnership will focus on utilizing BTQ's Quantum Sampling Proof-of-Work (QSPoW) protocol for this purpose. The initiative aims to future-proof Bitcoin and improve its scalability through innovative technological solutions. This collaboration signifies a significant step towards integrating quantum computing into blockchain technology.
news.headline: BTQ Technologies partners with Quandela to enhance Quantum Proof-of-Work protocols for blockchain validation.

news.summary: On Thursday, the House approved the Trump tax bill. Snowflake stocks surged following positive earnings. Bitcoin surpassed $110,000 in value. An upcoming Tesla competitor is set to be revealed. Additionally, Dow Jones futures experienced a decline. This development was reported by Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: House passes Trump tax bill as Bitcoin hits $110,000, Snowflake soars, and Tesla competitor unveiled. Dow Jones Futures fall.

news.summary: Dow Jones futures experienced a decline on Thursday in anticipation of the weekly unemployment claims report. Snowflake, an artificial intelligence company, witnessed a significant increase in its stock value following positive earnings announcements in the market today. The stock market faced a downturn after the approval of a tax bill by the House of Representatives, while Snowflake stood out with its impressive performance.
news.headline: Stocks fall after House approves tax bill, Dow futures down; AI stock Snowflake surges on earnings. Dow Jones drops, unemployment claims ahead.

news.summary: A recent study revealed that the unemployment rate in the United States dropped to 4.6% in April, which is the lowest it has been in over 50 years. This decrease is attributed to the addition of 573,000 jobs in the same month. The job gains were seen across multiple sectors, with the leisure and hospitality industry leading the way by adding 331,000 jobs. The strong job market has also led to an increase in average hourly earnings by 0.7%, bringing the total to $30.17. Additionally, the labor force participation rate saw a slight increase to 61.9%. Experts are optimistic about the continued recovery of the economy as more Americans reenter the workforce.
news.headline: Zambia's bumper corn harvest may help lower inflation rates.

news.summary: In Irvine, California on May 22, 2025, Biomerica, Inc. (NASDAQ: BMRA) revealed strong real-world data showcasing the efficacy of its inFoods® IBS solution. The company also introduced a new real-time patient feedback tool to bolster symptom monitoring and enhance patient results.
news.headline: Biomerica reports 49% reduction in IBS symptoms with inFoods® IBS, introduces real-time patient feedback system.
